title: FAIR AI Models in High Energy Physics
description:
This FAIR dataset has been used for ML studies[18], college courses[19,20]and
tutorials[21].

title: HE-MAN -- Homomorphically Encrypted MAchine learning with oNnx models
description:
Operationally, an AI model is usually instantiated in a software framework, such
as Scikit-learn[23], TensorFlow[24], PyTorch[25], XGBoost[26], or ONNX[27], that
may be serialized in a file on disk.

title: Moving towards FAIR practices in epidemiological research
description:
Specifically, the FAIR principles were originally introduced[7]as guidelines for
the management and stewardship of scientific datasets to optimize their reuse.
